comment.text: Button label displayed during the payment phase of the AI paywall process.

usage.context:
<Button
 size={ButtonSize.small}
 primary
 label={
 waitingPhase === "payment"
 ? t("AIPaywallWaitingPayment")
 : waitingPhase === "topup"
 ? t("AIPaywallWaitingTopUp")
 : t("AIPaywallEnableButton", { price: selectedAmount })
 }
 onClick={onEnableAI}
